mapper.insert: insert into generation_task_version ( task_id, session_id, version_no, ppt_url, doc_url, game_url, outline, outline_change_reason, requirements_snapshot, change_type, create_time ) values ( #{taskId}, #{sessionId}, #{versionNo}, #{pptUrl}, #{docUrl}, #{gameUrl}, #{outline}, #{outlineChangeReason}, #{requirementsSnapshot}, #{changeType}, #{createTime} )
mapper.select: select max(version_no) from generation_task_version where task_id = #{taskId}

select id, task_id, session_id, version_no, ppt_url, doc_url, game_url, outline, outline_change_reason, requirements_snapshot, change_type, create_time from generation_task_version where task_id = #{taskId} order by version_no desc

select id, task_id, session_id, version_no, ppt_url, doc_url, game_url, outline, outline_change_reason, requirements_snapshot, change_type, create_time from generation_task_version where task_id = #{taskId} and version_no = #{versionNo}
